claims.statement: Suez Canal length is larger than Great Wall of China length.
claims.explanation: Sources: USGS/NOAA/CTBUH/UNESCO and other references. Suez Canal length: 193 km. Great Wall of China length: 21196 km.

claims.statement: Speed of sound in air (~20°C) is slower than Peregrine falcon dive.
claims.explanation: Sources: NOAA/engineering references (values rounded). Speed of sound in air (~20°C): 1235 km/h. Peregrine falcon dive: 390 km/h.

claims.statement: Lærdal Tunnel length is longer than Channel Tunnel length.
claims.explanation: Sources: UNESCO/Britannica/national agencies (values rounded). Lærdal Tunnel length: 24.51 km. Channel Tunnel length: 50.45 km.

claims.statement: There are more squares on a chessboard than strings on a violin.
claims.explanation: Sources: standards & reference values. 64 squares vs 4 strings.

claims.statement: Barcode first scanned happened before First powered flight.
claims.explanation: Sources: widely documented dates. Barcode first scanned: 1974. First powered flight: 1903.
